info.description: Zero-Knowledge Battery Authentication Platform — REST API Gateway
info.title: Battery Pack Aadhaar (BPA) API

post.description: Logs in a stakeholder and sets HttpOnly cookies
Uses the refresh token cookie to get a new access token
Registers a new stakeholder with Email and Password
Decodes a QR code payload and returns battery information
post.summary: Scan and decode a QR code

get.description: Decode BPAN and return battery static data (public endpoint)
Returns the hash-chain audit trail for a battery (government/admin only)
Returns the current compliance status against BPA regulations
Returns the latest SoH value and status for a battery

patch.description: Records a new SoH reading for a battery (service provider only)

get.description: Returns the full history of SoH readings for a battery

get.summary: Get BMCS data for a battery (role-gated)

post.summary: Submit BMCS data for a battery

get.description: Returns the full chain of ownership for a battery

post.description: Records an ownership transfer event for a battery

get.description: Generates a QR code PNG image containing the battery's BPAN payload
get.summary: Generate QR code for a battery

post.description: Records a recycling event with material recovery data (recycler only)
Records a reuse certification event (reuse operator)

get.description: Returns the most recent telemetry readings for a battery

post.description: Uploads new telemetry readings from BMS/OEM (encrypted at rest)

get.description: Returns historical telemetry data for a battery
Returns all recorded compliance violations for a battery
Fetches battery details via BPAN from the Core Engine

post.description: Registers a new battery with the BPA Core Engine

lithium_content_g.description: Private fields — populated only for authorised roles

partial.description: true if private fields were redacted

BearerAuth.description: JWT Bearer token (access_token cookie or Authorization header)
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
